docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2020 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF TO SEP-28-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROLANDO CHAN CANUL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASON FORDLEY IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT THIS MATTER BE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH CASE #862406 ROLANDO CHAN CANUL V. JUAN AVILA KU ON SEPTEMBER 28, 20 AT 8:30 A.M. DEFENDANT JASON FORDLEY IS INSTRUCTED TO CONTACT COURTCALL TO RESCHEDULE HIS APPEARANCE ON THAT DAY. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-21-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROLANDO CHAN CANUL, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, DANIEL NAVARRO IS PRESENT DEFENDANT JASON FORDLEY IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. COURT ADDRESS PARTIES PRESENT. AGREEMENT OF PARTIES REACHED ON FEB-03-2020 IS MODIFIED. THE CURRENT REMAINING BALANCE OF $9,800.00 TO BE PAID IN 36 MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $272.22 STARTING ON 10-1-20 AND ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $272.22 WILL BE PAID ON 10-1-23. PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR 12-21-20. IF PAYMENTS ARE BEING MEET AS AGREED TO, PARTIES SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT THAT PAYMENTS ARE BEING MEET AND NO APPEARANCE WILL BE REQUIRED. A NEW PROGRESS REPORT WILL BE SET FOR 90 DAYS AND EVERY 90 DAYS UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT BEING PAID AS AGREED TO AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT WHICH TIME JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
